caption: The video sequence features a white screen with a teal border that transitions into a grey screen with the same border. Centered at the top is a logo consisting of a stylized monitor and speech bubble with the text "EDUcharlas" beneath it. As the sequence progresses, additional text appears in orange and grey. The text "#" appears first, followed by the phrase "RECURSOS EDUCATIVOS ABIERTOS: ¡TODO UN MUNDO A TU ALCANCE!" and "Realizado por intef" accompanied by a small circular logo. Small print at the bottom states, "Obra publicada con Licencia Creative Commons Reconocimiento-Compartir Igual 4.0," alongside Creative Commons icons. The text changes from "#" to "#6" in the latter half of the sequence. The final transition shows the background changing from white to a solid light grey, while all the logos and text remain centered and static.
